posts.author: prakashhindujageneva (prakash hinduja geneva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m Prakash Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss) working on a project board in monday.com and would like to automatically change the status of an item when a specific date arrives. I’ve tried exploring the automation recipes but I’m not entirely sure which one fits best for this use case.

Would appreciate any advice, or examples if you’ve set this up before.

Regards
Prakash Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss)

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
